'''dhamatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whanket|whanket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whanket|whanket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhamatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmæthæth|dhæmæthæth]] || [[word:dhæmæthæj|dhæmæthæj]] || [[word:dhæmæthæsh|dhæmæthæsh]] || [[word:dhæmæthæ|dhæmæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamamathath|dhamamathath]] || [[word:dhamamathaj|dhamamathaj]] || [[word:dhamamathash|dhamamathash]] || [[word:dhamamatha|dhamamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamathath|dhamathath]] || [[word:dhamathaj|dhamathaj]] || [[word:dhamathash|dhamathash]] || [[word:dhamatha|dhamatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamafthath|dhamafthath]] || [[word:dhamafthaj|dhamafthaj]] || [[word:dhamafthash|dhamafthash]] || [[word:dhamafthaf|dhamafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamathatha|dhamathatha]] || [[word:dhamathaja|dhamathaja]] || [[word:dhamathasha|dhamathasha]] || [[word:dhamathaka|dhamathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamathath|dhamathath]] || [[word:dhamathaj|dhamathaj]] || [[word:dhamathash|dhamathash]] || [[word:dhamatha|dhamatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamathathal|dhamathathal]] || [[word:dhamathajal|dhamathajal]] || [[word:dhamathashal|dhamathashal]] || [[word:dhamathakal|dhamathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamathathatha|dhamathathatha]] || [[word:dhamathajaja|dhamathajaja]] || [[word:dhamathashasha|dhamathashasha]] || [[word:dhamathaka|dhamathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamathathan|dhamathathan]] || [[word:dhamathajan|dhamathajan]] || [[word:dhamathashan|dhamathashan]] || [[word:dhamathakan|dhamathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamathathaoro|dhamathathaoro]] || [[word:dhamathajaoro|dhamathajaoro]] || [[word:dhamathashaoro|dhamathashaoro]] || [[word:dhamathakaoro|dhamathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
